positive: A highly stylized, detailed illustration of a whimsical woodland creature, perhaps a fox or an owl, integrated with geometric botanicals and abstract celestial elements. The design should feature strong black linework against a creamy, off-white background, with pops of iridescent color (teal, gold, sapphire) used only for accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, utilizing clean silhouettes and negative space effectively, making it ideal for a repeating pattern or a single patch design. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern minimalism, highly scalable and suitable for screen printing on fabric. Focus on intricate details in the fur texture and the delicate veining of the leaves, rendered with vector-like precision. Full body shot, centered composition, symmetrical balance, crisp contrast, studio lighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, lowres, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grunge, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, duplicate, out of frame
